# tracing

```go
import "github.com/retr0h/osapi/internal/telemetry/tracing"
```

Package tracing provides OpenTelemetry tracing initialization and helpers.

<a name="ExtractTraceContext"></a>

## func [ExtractTraceContext](https://github.com/osapi-io/osapi/blob/main/internal/telemetry/tracing/propagation.go#L81-L84)

```go
func ExtractTraceContext(ctx context.Context, data map[string]interface{}) context.Context
```

ExtractTraceContext extracts trace context from a data map and returns a new
context with the extracted span context. If no trace context is present, the
original context is returned.

<a name="ExtractTraceContextFromHeader"></a>

## func [ExtractTraceContextFromHeader](https://github.com/osapi-io/osapi/blob/main/internal/telemetry/tracing/propagation.go#L105-L108)

```go
func ExtractTraceContextFromHeader(ctx context.Context, header http.Header) context.Context
```

ExtractTraceContextFromHeader extracts trace context from HTTP\-compatible
headers and returns a new context. If no trace context is present, the original
context is returned.

Header keys are normalized to canonical MIME format before extraction. Some
transports \(e.g., NATS JetStream\) deliver headers with non\-canonical casing
\(lowercase "traceparent" instead of "Traceparent"\), which breaks
http.Header.Get lookups. Normalizing ensures reliable extraction.

<a name="InitTracer"></a>

## func [InitTracer](https://github.com/osapi-io/osapi/blob/main/internal/telemetry/tracing/tracer.go#L54-L58)

```go
func InitTracer(ctx context.Context, serviceName string, cfg config.TracingConfig) (func(context.Context) error, error)
```

InitTracer initializes the OpenTelemetry tracer provider. It always sets the
global W3C TraceContext propagator. When tracing is disabled, a noop provider is
used. Returns a shutdown function that must be called on exit.

<a name="InjectTraceContext"></a>

## func [InjectTraceContext](https://github.com/osapi-io/osapi/blob/main/internal/telemetry/tracing/propagation.go#L71-L74)

```go
func InjectTraceContext(ctx context.Context, data map[string]interface{})
```

InjectTraceContext injects the current span's trace context into a data map. If
there is no active span, this is a no\-op.

<a name="InjectTraceContextToHeader"></a>

## func [InjectTraceContextToHeader](https://github.com/osapi-io/osapi/blob/main/internal/telemetry/tracing/propagation.go#L90-L93)

```go
func InjectTraceContextToHeader(ctx context.Context, header http.Header)
```

InjectTraceContextToHeader injects the current span's trace context into
HTTP\-compatible headers \(usable with nats.Header via type conversion\).

<a name="NewTraceHandler"></a>

## func [NewTraceHandler](https://github.com/osapi-io/osapi/blob/main/internal/telemetry/tracing/slog.go#L38-L40)

```go
func NewTraceHandler(inner slog.Handler) slog.Handler
```

NewTraceHandler creates a slog.Handler that adds trace_id and span_id attributes
from the context's span, delegating to the inner handler.
